name: Base Dollar
collateral: LP-collateralized stablecoin forking Liquity V2 on Base L2; yield generated from AERO farming, with revenue split between users, protocol-owned liquidity treasury, and BD stakers
launchPhaseDetail: Fork of Liquity V2 on Base; external security audit completed; high and medium severity fixes merged; not yet deployed to mainnet

milestones.title: Base Dollar announced as Liquity V2 fork on Base L2
milestones.description: LP-collateralized stablecoin with yield from AERO farming; revenue shared between users, POL treasury, and BD stakers.

milestones.title: External security audit remediation: high and medium severity fixes merged
milestones.description: Merged fixes for LP token price manipulation vulnerability (H01) and timelock bypass bug (M02); fuzz tests added for Aero LP pricing.
